mapper.sql: t0.id, t0.tenant_id, t0.creator, t0.create_stamp, t0.last_editor, t0.last_edit_stamp, t0.pay_amount, t0.pay_date, t0.payee, t0.receiving_account, t0.receiving_bank, t0.pay_status, t0.project_name, t0.project_id, t0.pay_explain, t0.remarks, t0.lawyer_name, t0.lawyer_id, t0.flow_state, t0.is_deleted
